channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mark Kelly Sets Internet Ablaze With Claim About Our Munitions, Hegseth's Response Is Pure Fire
Energy Sec. Wright:Â Trump Open to Gas Tax Pause
item.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Sunday the Trump administration would support suspending the federal gas tax if it helps lower fuel prices for Amer...

item.title: Democrats in Panic: GOP to Gain 10 House Seats
item.description: Democrats have gone into what party insiders openly describe as panic mode as Republicans suddenly see a clearer path to holding the House in 2026. A ...

item.title: Trump Blasts Appointees Gorsuch, Barrett, on Tariffs Ruling
item.description: President Donald Trump on Sunday sharply criticized Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch and Amy Coney Barrett, both appointed by him during his first ...
